artifacts.summary: Analysis recommending CanonicalR be kept as derived shorthand. CanonicalR used in 36+ active files for Preorder definitions, transitivity chains, and witness extraction. Recovery theorem CanonicalR <-> exists n>=1 CanonicalTask bridges duration-agnostic and duration-precise reasoning. Removal would require massive refactoring with ergonomic costs.

partial_progress.details: Research complete - analyzed 57 files using CanonicalR, evaluated keep vs remove tradeoffs

implementation_notes: Forward direction (CanonicalTask -> CanonicalR) is easy via temp_4 transitivity
Backward direction requires successor existence (task 12) and F-nesting bounds
Backward-compat layer proves canonical_forward_G/F from CanonicalTask
